analysis.summary: Новите слънчеви инсталации в Невада спаднаха драматично през 2025 г.Peak Energy и RWE разгорнахме батерия с натрий-ион в Уисконсин. Изследванията в областта на възобновяемата енергия продължават да се развиват.
key_developments: New solar installations in Nevada fell dramatically in 2025
Peak Energy and RWE deploying sodium-ion battery in Wisconsin
analysis.open_source_momentum: Protontypes/open-sustainable-technology и PyPSA/PyPSA са примери за отворен изходен код в областта на устойчивите технологии и анализ на енергийните системи.
analysis.scientific_frontier: Fairness in Robust Unit Commitment Problem Considering Suppression of Renewable Energy и Eigenvalue Patterns and Participation Analysis of Symmetric Renewable Energy Power Systems представят последните научни изследвания в областта на възобновяемата енергия.
analysis.relevance_to_goal: Разработването на устойчиви енергийни източници е критически важен аспект на изграждането на устойчива общочовешка цивилизация.

news_items.title: New solar installations in Nevada fell dramatically in 2025
news_items.snippet: New solar installations in Nevada declined significantly in 2025, ranking 27th nationally, according to a report by the Solar Energy Industries Association.

news_items.title: Peak Energy and RWE deploying sodium-ion battery in Wisconsin
news_items.snippet: Peak Energy will set up its sodium-ion grid storage battery technology at the RWE Lab, as the developer eyes larger deployment in MISO territory.

news_items.title: One year after Green Bank’s demise, court mulls future of grant-based climate policy
news_items.snippet: The Trump administration faced skepticism in court over its claim of an unfettered right to break contracts. But it’s not clear that can save efforts to sow a clean energy future with federal seed money.

arxiv_papers.title: Fairness in Robust Unit Commitment Problem Considering Suppression of Renewable Energy
arxiv_papers.snippet: Power company operators make power generation plans one day in advance, in what is known as the Unit Commitment (UC) problem. arxiv_papers.title: Eigenvalue Patterns and Participation Analysis of Symmetric Renewable Energy Power Systems
arxiv_papers.snippet: State-space analysis is widely employed for examining power system dynamics but faces challenges in large-scale power systems integrated with numerous inverter-based resources (IBRs), where the significant increase of system states complicates modal analysis.
